title: Pole Poppenspaeler
writer: Alfred Braun, Veit Harlan, Theodor Storm
actors: Max Eckard, Elfie Mayerhofer, Eugen Klöpfer
plot: Paul Paulsen, an old weaving mill owner, remembers his youth. As a child, he loved seeing a puppeteer performing in town. He was especially taken with Lisei, the puppeteer's daughter. Years later he meets her again in a small Swab...
